live.title: 5th T20I - 25 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: New Zealand take on South Africa for their 5th T20I clash at Hagley Oval, Christchurch. With the series finely balanced at 2-2, both sides are set for a decisive showdown. Fans can look forward to a gripping finale as the Black Cap's batting firepower meets the Proteas sharp bowling attack. Find out as we bring you all the action from South Africa Tour of New Zealand 2026, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
live.longDescription: New Zealand take on South Africa for their 5th T20I clash at Hagley Oval, Christchurch. With the series finely balanced at 2-2, both sides are set for a decisive showdown. upcoming.title: Sitaare Zameen Par
upcoming.shortDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service. His initial prejudice fades as his players show him a new perspective on life. Catch Sitaare Zameen Par streaming from 3rd April, only on Sony LIV.

upcoming.title: Hastinapur Ke Veer
